svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="jcode-architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-728" dy="-257" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="clients" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=34;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;verticalAlign=top;" value="Front-ends (thin, stateless — just attach & render)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="380" x="60" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tui" parent="clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="TUI
(terminal UI)
jcode-tui" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="30" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli" parent="clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="CLI
jcode run / debug
src/cli" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="200" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="acp" parent="clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="ACP adapter
(editor / IDE bridge)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="30" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcp" parent="clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="mcp-serve
(re-publishes tools
over MCP)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="200" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="clientnote" parent="clients" style="text;html=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#3b5a86;" value="These processes hold NO agent state.
They render what the daemon streams." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="320" x="30" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="daemon" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=34;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;verticalAlign=top;" value="jcode serve — the DAEMON (owns all state; the agent harness + control plane)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="600" width="700" x="620" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="harness" parent="daemon" style="swimlane;startSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e9f4e6;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="Harness (the agent loop)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="310" x="30" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop" parent="harness" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Agent loop
message → provider → tool calls
→ execute → feed back → repeat
jcode-app-core / jcode-agent-runtime" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sessions" parent="harness" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Sessions + history
context / compaction / memory" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="270" x="20" y="125" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="registry" parent="harness" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Tool registry
bash · read · edit · glob · grep · …
+ MCP tools" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="20" y="195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="control" parent="daemon" style="swimlane;startSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e9f4e6;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="Control plane (server layer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="310" x="360" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lifecycle" parent="control" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Session lifecycle
reload / exec-handoff
jcode-app-core/src/server" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="270" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="swarm" parent="control" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Swarm coordinator
spawns forked worker agents
jcode-swarm-core" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="270" x="20" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcpmgr" parent="control" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="MCP child manager
owns / reaps external tool servers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="270" x="20" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="provider" parent="daemon" style="swimlane;startSize=26;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="Provider layer — one trait, ~20 hand-rolled adapters (NO vendor SDKs; just reqwest)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="640" x="30" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ptrait" parent="provider" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="trait Provider
(jcode-provider-core)
the one seam" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="150" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="padapt" parent="provider" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f7f2fb;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="jcode-provider-anthropic / openai / gemini /
copilot / cursor / openrouter / antigravity / bedrock

each: request shaping · SSE stream parsing ·
OAuth · tool-schema translation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="420" x="195" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="llm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="LLM APIs
Anthropic · OpenAI
Gemini · …" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="620" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tools" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="External MCP tool servers
serena · graphiti · …" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="1080" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="binnote" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="ONE Rust binary.
src/main.rs is a multiplexer:
the same executable becomes
the daemon, a TUI, the CLI,
the ACP adapter, or mcp-serve
depending on the subcommand." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="380" x="60" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="clients" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="daemon" value="Unix socket
JSON-RPC"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="provider" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0.35;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="llm" value="HTTPS (reqwest)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="daemon" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.9;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="tools" value="stdio / spawn"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
ONE Rust binary.
src/main.rs is a multiplexer:
the same executable becomes
the daemon, a TUI, the CLI,
the ACP adapter, or mcp-serve
depending on the subcommand.
